# Sprint 7.1 Core Features

**Project:** TrendBuy Return Reduction Initiative
**Sprint:** Sprint 7. Trendguard Consumer App Prototype
**Objective:** Design a lightweight consumer-facing prototype called TrendGuard to surface personalized fit guidance and exchange/credit options.

## Description
Define core features for the TrendGuard app, including post-purchase guidance, real-time chat, and one-tap exchange/credit acceptance.

Core features document
